name: How to Back Up Photos: The Best 3-2-1 Backup Method Guide

step.name: Keep 3 copies of your data (one primary and two backups).
step.text: Keep 3 copies of your data (one primary and two backups).

step.name: Store these on 2 different types of media (e.g., hard drive and cloud storage).
step.text: Store these on 2 different types of media (e.g., hard drive and cloud storage).

step.name: Ensure 1 copy is stored offsite , away from your primary location.
step.text: Ensure 1 copy is stored offsite , away from your primary location.
